vibe: Industrial, architectural, high-density, highly legible, anti-fluff. Feels like a technical planner, an architect's blueprint, or a high-end IDE.

mono.usage: Labels, issue IDs (e.g. PRJ-102), metadata, tiny tags, uppercase overlines.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Expose the skeleton. Use border-collapse style layouts where possible.
spacing_and_layout.corners: rounded-none everywhere. Absolutely no soft rounded corners.
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px solid #111111 everywhere to separate sections. Columns in the kanban board should be separated by hard vertical border lines.
spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous internal padding (p-6, p-8) for main containers and dashboards, tight padding (p-2, p-3) for dense board cards.
spacing_and_layout.shadows: Hard geometric shadows ONLY. e.g., shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(17,17,17,1)] for hover states or active elements. No soft blur shadows.

components.buttons: Square edges, bold uppercase text, hard borders. Primary button: bg-[#001AFF] text-white hover:bg-[#0014CC]. Secondary: bg-white text-[#111111] border border-[#111111] hover:bg-[#F4F4F0].
components.cards: bg-white border border-[#111111] rounded-none. No default soft shadow, use hard shadow on hover.
components.inputs: rounded-none border border-[#111111] bg-white focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#001AFF] focus:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(0,26,255,1)].
components.kanban_board: Columns should span full height with border-r border-[#111111]. Board background: #F4F4F0. Task cards: bg-white border border-[#111111] hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(17,17,17,1)] transition-all duration-200. Use Phosphor icons for issue types and priority.
components.badges: Uppercase, IBM Plex Mono, border border-[#111111], px-2 py-0.5 text-xs.
components.sidebar: border-r border-[#111111] bg-[#F4F4F0] or white. High contrast active states with black background and white text.

icons.style: Regular or Bold weight, technical, sharp.

media.login_background: CSS dot grid or architectural line grid (e.g. background-image: radial-gradient(#111111 1px, transparent 1px) with background-size: 20px 20px). Do not use an image, use a CSS pattern to match the brutalist tech vibe.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a highly functional Jira-style project management app using the Swiss Brutalist aesthetic.
Do NOT use generic rounded borders, soft box-shadows, or purple/teal colors. Everything should be geometric, sharp, with 1px black borders (border-[#111111]).
Use 'Chivo' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body. Use 'IBM Plex Mono' for small metadata like Issue IDs (e.g., PRJ-104) and tags.

For the Kanban Board, construct a strict grid where columns have a right border and the background is slightly off-white (#F4F4F0). Task cards must have solid #111111 borders and a hard shadow on hover (e.g., shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(17,17,17,1)]).
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes for testing.

Implement Authentication, Workspace Dashboard, Projects List, Kanban Board (drag-drop status), Backlog, Sprint Management, Issue details (dialogs with descriptions, comments, attachments), and Team management as requested.
Colors: Primary actions use Klein Blue (#001AFF). Use specific colors for issue types: Epic (#FF6B00), Story (#00A86B), Task (#001AFF), Bug (#E63946).
The UI should feel dense, technical, and objective, like a high-end IDE or architect's tool, while maintaining all standard SaaS functionality expected of a project management tool.

Ensure standard HTML/Tailwind for base structural components to maintain the distinctive styling, and customize Shadcn heavily (strip rounded corners, remove default soft shadows) where used for interactive elements.
